strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with proven mastery of primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker)
Active AI agent infrastructure expertise—currently building MCP code generators and agentic frameworks at re:cinq, directly addressing required skill
Strong engineering discipline demonstrated across roles: TDD, CI/CD, pairing culture, and created open-source testing libraries showing architecture depth
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed; while Node.js background is extensive, framework-specific knowledge gap requires ramp-up
Testing framework expertise not detailed (Vitest, Jest, Playwright unmentioned despite TDD emphasis); unclear hands-on proficiency with required test runners
Secondary language and platform gaps: no Kotlin, Python, PostgreSQL, GCP, or Azure mentioned; experience is AWS and MongoDB focused
response.justification: Candidate significantly exceeds the 6+ years requirement with 15 years of full-stack engineering, currently succeeding as Staff Engineer at re:cinq. Directly meets the required AI agent development skill through active MCP and agentic workflow work. Strong coverage of primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker) and demonstrated engineering excellence (TDD, CI/CD, code quality). Main gaps are Nest.js framework specificity and some secondary technologies; however, track record of rapid technology acquisition and current on-team success mitigate risk.
